unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: They're my grandparents.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: grand (大的/长辈) + parent (父母) = 祖父母。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What does family mean to you?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: ea组合发/i:/，这句话在问意思。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: your grandmother's husband - E. grandfather
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: hus (house缩写感) + band (绑定) = 绑定在家里的人（丈夫）。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: this is my ping-pong bat
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 蝙蝠也是bat，想象用球拍打蝙蝠。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Do you often play ping-pong together?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: to + get + her，去接她，然后就在一起了。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Yes, we play every day.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: every (每一) + day (天) = 每天。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He spends a lot of time fishing.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 花钱花时间，用end结尾，花完了就结束了。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She can play it really well!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: real (真的) + ly (副词后缀) = 真的，非常。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Match the definitions with members of the family.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 记忆（remember）里面的成员（member）。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: complete the table about Teng Fei's family activities.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: act (行动) + ivity (名词后缀) = 活动。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Sam is seven, and he really likes chess.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 车（ch）死（ess）了，下棋把车下死了。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He is really funny, and he often makes us laugh.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: fun (乐趣) + ny = 有趣的，好笑的。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: he often makes us laugh.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: au组合发/ɑ:/，gh发/f/，大声笑出来。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: My sister is very different.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: differ (不同) + ent (形容词后缀)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: But I play the violin really well.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: vi (六) o (圆) lin (琴弦)，想象六根圆弦的小提琴。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I'm the one with the pink hat.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 他（h）有一顶帽子（at）。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He's very handsome.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: hand (手) + some (一些) = 手巧又英俊。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: My little brother, Sam, is on his knee.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: k不发音，ee发/i:/，膝盖在呢（knee）。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: My grandparents, Jack and Sarah, are in the middle.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: mid表示中间，le结尾。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: My grandparents have three grandchildren.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: grand (大的/长辈) + child (孩子) = 孙辈。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Fred is Jack and Sarah's son.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 儿子（son）像太阳（sun）。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She likes to go hiking.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 骑车（bike）去远足（hike）。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Next to him is my mum.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 下一个（next）到（to）旁边。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Alan is my first name.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: first (第一) + name (名字) = 第一个名字。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Wood is my last name.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: last (最后) + name (名字) = 最后的名称（姓）。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We also call the last name a 'family name' or 'surname'.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: sur (在...之上) + name (名字) = 冠在名字之上的姓。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It shows great respect to my grandfather.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: re (反复) + spect (看) = 反复看，表示尊敬。
